name: Hopin Virtual Events API
what_it_does: Hopin REST API for virtual and hybrid event platform. Enables AI agents to query event registrations, retrieve attendee data, access session analytics, and integrate event intelligence into marketing and CRM workflows. Hopin is an all-in-one event platform covering registration, networking, streaming, and expo areas.
use_cases: Querying event registration and attendance data from event operations agents
Retrieving attendee engagement metrics from virtual event analytics agents
Accessing session replay and content data from event content management agents
Integrating Hopin event data into CRM and marketing automation workflow agents
not_for: Large-scale in-person events without virtual component
Consumer social streaming (Hopin is enterprise event focused)
best_when: A company using Hopin for virtual and hybrid events wants AI agents to analyze attendee engagement, surface event performance data, and integrate event intelligence into CRM and post-event workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Attendee data and engagement tracking is personal data. GDPR compliance required. Note: Hopin has undergone significant changes — verify API stability given corporate restructuring.

auth.notes: Hopin OAuth 2.0. Developer portal for API access. Enterprise accounts required.

pricing.paid_tiers: Hopin pricing varies; contact sales for current plans
pricing.notes: Hopin has undergone significant business changes. Verify current pricing and API availability with Hopin sales.

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Attendee personal data and engagement tracking requires GDPR compliance
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
Hopin has undergone major corporate restructuring — verify API stability and feature availability
Parts of Hopin product sold to different companies — verify current product scope
API documentation quality has declined due to corporate changes — contact support for clarity
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Event attendee PII and engagement data. SOC2, GDPR. EU data residency. Corporate restructuring may affect service continuity — assess risk before deep integration.

security_score_components.security_notes: Attendee PII and engagement data. SOC2, GDPR. EU data residency. Corporate restructuring risk factor.
